Class BatchGetResult<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.result.BatchGetResult<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the item type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Consumed
public final class BatchGetResult<T> extends Object implements Consumed
Holds the result of a BatchGetBuilder execution. Contains the successfully retrieved items and any keys that were not processed.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BatchGetResult(@NonNull List<T> items, @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.KeysAndAttributes> unprocessedKeys)
    Constructs a new BatchGetResult with no consumed capacity information.
    BatchGetResult(@NonNull List<T> items, @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.KeysAndAttributes> unprocessedKeys, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ConsumedCapacity consumedCapacity)
    Constructs a new BatchGetResult.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ConsumedCapacity
    consumedCapacity()
    Returns the consumed capacity, or null if capacity was not requested or the operation does not support capacity tracking.
    boolean
    hasUnprocessed()
    Returns whether any keys were not processed.

    items()
    Returns the successfully retrieved items.
    @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.KeysAndAttributes>

    Returns the unprocessed keys, keyed by table name.

  • Constructor Details

    • BatchGetResult

      public BatchGetResult(@NonNull List<T> items, @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.KeysAndAttributes> unprocessedKeys)
      Constructs a new BatchGetResult with no consumed capacity information.
      Parameters:
      items - the successfully retrieved items
      unprocessedKeys - the keys that were not processed, keyed by table name

    • BatchGetResult

      public BatchGetResult(@NonNull List<T> items, @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.KeysAndAttributes> unprocessedKeys, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ConsumedCapacity consumedCapacity)
      Constructs a new BatchGetResult.
      Parameters:
      items - the successfully retrieved items
      unprocessedKeys - the keys that were not processed, keyed by table name
      consumedCapacity - the consumed capacity, or null

  • Method Details

    • consumedCapacity

      public @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ConsumedCapacity consumedCapacity()
      Returns the consumed capacity, or null if capacity was not requested or the operation does not support capacity tracking.
      Specified by:
      consumedCapacity in interface Consumed
      Returns:
      consumed capacity, or null

    • items

      public @NonNull List<T> items()
      Returns the successfully retrieved items.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of items (never null)

    • unprocessedKeys

      public @NonNull Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.KeysAndAttributes> unprocessedKeys()
      Returns the unprocessed keys, keyed by table name.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable map of unprocessed keys (never null)

    • hasUnprocessed

      public boolean hasUnprocessed()
      Returns whether any keys were not processed.
      Returns:
      true if there are unprocessed keys, false otherwise
